text: Question Type File Upload File Upload Target Audience Target Audience Mid-to-senior professionals (3+ years) Mid-to-senior professionals (3+ years) Challenge Type Challenge Type Team Based Team Based Participation Type Participation Type Team Event Team Event Event Flow Event Flow Refer to the HackerRank Academy course Refer to the HackerRank Academy course Engage packages HackerRank Engage offers two package options to meet your event needs: Standard offering The Standard package is a do-it-yourself (DIY) solution that allows you to independently set up and run events without support from the HackerRank team. This option is ideal if you have your own candidate pool and a defined outreach strategy. To use the Standard offering, you must have: Access to the Engage platform. Access to the Engage platform. A sufficient number of attempts to host and manage your events. A sufficient number of attempts to host and manage your events. Managed offering The Managed package includes all features of the Standard offering, along with additional support and services to help you run a successful event. You can choose from the following services based on your specific requirements: Custom content creation Higher scale for coding questions Higher scale for project questions Custom content creation Higher scale for coding questions Higher scale for coding questions Higher scale for project questions Higher scale for project questions Project management support Publishing a consolidated event post on HackerRank’s social channels Project management support Publishing a consolidated event post on HackerRank’s social channels Publishing a consolidated event post on HackerRank’s social channels Custom microsite modifications Custom microsite modifications Weekend support Weekend support The following timeline outlines the key activities and sets expectations FOR the Managed offering of Engage: How-to guides The following articles will help you get started with Engage: Create an Event Create an Event Set Up a Microsite Set Up a Microsite Source and Manage Candidates for Event Source and Manage Candidates for Event Set Up Emails Set Up Emails Set Up the Event Challenge Set Up the Event Challenge View Event Statistics View Event Statistics End Your Event on a High Note with Leaderboard End Your Event on a High Note with Leaderboard Get in touch Interested in using Engage or want to learn more? Contact us at engage-support@hackerrank.com . You will receive a response within one business day.
